title: Hut 8, IREN deals lift AI-focused Bitcoin mining stocks

title: Nigerian president signs order on approach to crypto regulation, taxes
summary: The West African country’s executive order established a virtual asset council and addressed the fragmentation of crypto regulation for oversight and enforcement.

title: Stocks Decline as Oil Whipsaws on US-Iran Risks: Markets Wrap
summary: A renewed bout of oil volatility sent stocks lower, with concerns about further escalation in Middle East hostilities outweighing technology gains.

title: Canada Financials Stocks Close In on Top Spot as Energy Momentum Fades
summary: Canada’s financial stocks took a breather Monday after a torrid four-month rally that put them on the verge of overtaking energy as the best performing sector in the equity market this year.

title: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
